task_completion.description: Navigate to the gym editing interface for 'Downtown Fitness Hub'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the wger fitness manager interface, either displaying a list of gyms including 'Downtown Fitness Hub' being clicked, or the edit form for this specific gym.

task_completion.description: Update the gym name to 'Iron Peak Athletics'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An input field labeled 'Name' (or similar) in the gym edit form containing the text 'Iron Peak Athletics'.
An input field labeled 'Phone' or 'Contact' in the gym edit form containing the text '+1-555-842-9631'.
An input field labeled 'Street' or 'Address' in the gym edit form containing the text '742 Evergreen Terrace'.

task_completion.description: Update the city and zip code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Input fields in the gym edit form for 'City' containing 'Springfield' and 'Zip Code' (or Postal Code) containing '62704'.
A success message indicating the gym was updated, or a return to the gym list page showing the newly renamed 'Iron Peak Athletics' gym.

integrity.description: The agent used the wger web GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the wger web application, not terminal commands (like curl or python scripts) making API or database calls.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual wger application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the wger fitness manager web UI, not a text editor modifying source code or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not edit the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No screenshots showing sqlite3, psql, or other database management tools being used to alter the gym records directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original gym name is 'Downtown Fitness Hub'. The expected new values to verify in the screenshots are: Name: 'Iron Peak Athletics', Phone: '+1-555-842-9631', Street: '742 Evergreen Terrace', City: 'Springfield', Zip Code: '62704'.
